title: Event annotation (v2)
description: Append-only annotation, annotations/<event_id>/<seq>.json: rollback/flap notes, discrepancy links, mirror-corroborated notes (design.md 1.2 layout, 1.4 flap damping and dedup rules). Field shape not pinned in design.md; pinned here (Phase 0 resolution).

kind.description: rollback: equal-and-opposite reversal inside the damping window — the event's effective status gains a rolled_back flag; discrepancy: link to a conflicting-value exception item; mirror-corroborated: only same-lineage mirrors corroborate (stays unconfirmed)

related_event_id.description: Other event involved (e.g. the reversal observation), when one exists
